statusSpecificSub: I have something specific I want to share
chooseStatus: Choose the status that best describes how you feel right now
doneFineSubheading: Asinu will check in with you again this evening.
seeDoctor: Consider seeing a doctor for a check-up.
followUpIn: Asinu will check in again in {{hours}} hours.
followUpHighAlert: Asinu will follow up in 1–2 hours.
followUpNormal: Asinu will follow up in 3 hours.

progressionWorsened: Your condition seems to have worsened.
redFlagDesc: Asinu has detected some signs that need close monitoring. Please rest and check your vitals, or contact a family member or doctor if needed.
errorSaveStatus: Could not save status. Please try again.
